# Magnatic — Full Landing Page Build Prompt

## Project Overview

Build a complete Next.js landing page for **Magnatic** — an AI-powered marketing platform that creates content using AI influencers, AI workflows, and a human workforce to deliver the best advertising results. The site should feel premium, dark, futuristic, and immersive.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 14+ (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui project structure, Framer Motion

---

## Brand Assets — SVG Logos

### Full Logo (Icon + Wordmark) — White version (for dark backgrounds, use in navbar)

### Icon Only — White (favicon, compact brand mark)

Save as `public/icon-white.svg`:

---

## Logo Usage Rules

- **Navbar:** Full white logo (`logo-full-white.svg`) at `h-8`, left-aligned
- **Favicon:** `icon-white.svg` as SVG favicon
- **Footer:** Full white logo at `h-6` with `opacity-60`
- **Loading/splash:** White icon mark centered with pulse animation
- **NEVER use black variants on the dark shader background**

---

## Page Structure (Top to Bottom)

### 1. NAVBAR (Fixed, glassmorphic)

Fixed navbar at top with `z-50`:
- **Left:** Full Magnatic logo (white SVG `logo-full-white.svg`), height ~32px
- **Right:** Links ("Features", "How It Works", "Pricing") in `text-neutral-300 hover:text-white` + "Get Started" CTA (`bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/20 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full`)
- **Background:** `bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5`
- Fade-in animation on load

### 2. SHADER LINES BACKGROUND (Full-page WebGL)

`position: fixed`, `inset-0`, `z-0` — always behind everything.

**Component: `components/ui/shader-lines.tsx`**

```tsx
"use client"

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react"

declare global {
  interface Window {
    THREE: any
  }
}

export function ShaderAnimation() {
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const sceneRef = useRef<{
    camera: any; scene: any; renderer: any; uniforms: any; animationId: number | null
  }>({ camera: null, scene: null, renderer: null, uniforms: null, animationId: null })

  useEffect(() => {
    const script = document.createElement("script")
    script.src = "https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/89/three.min.js"
    script.onload = () => { if (containerRef.current && window.THREE) initThreeJS() }
    document.head.appendChild(script)
    return () => {
      if (sceneRef.current.animationId) cancelAnimationFrame(sceneRef.current.animationId)
      if (sceneRef.current.renderer) sceneRef.current.renderer.dispose()
      document.head.removeChild(script)
    }
  }, [])

  const initThreeJS = () => {
    if (!containerRef.current || !window.THREE) return
    const THREE = window.THREE
    const container = containerRef.current
    container.innerHTML = ""
    const camera = new THREE.Camera(); camera.position.z = 1
    const scene = new THREE.Scene()
    const geometry = new THREE.PlaneBufferGeometry(2, 2)
    const uniforms = { time: { type: "f", value: 1.0 }, resolution: { type: "v2", value: new THREE.Vector2() } }
    const vertexShader = `void main() { gl_Position = vec4(position, 1.0); }`
    const fragmentShader = `
      #define TWO_PI 6.2831853072
      #define PI 3.14159265359
      precision highp float;
      uniform vec2 resolution; uniform float time;
      float random(in float x) { return fract(sin(x)*1e4); }
      float random(vec2 st) { return fract(sin(dot(st.xy, vec2(12.9898,78.233)))*43758.5453123); }
      varying vec2 vUv;
      void main(void) {
        vec2 uv = (gl_FragCoord.xy * 2.0 - resolution.xy) / min(resolution.x, resolution.y);
        vec2 fMosaicScal = vec2(4.0, 2.0); vec2 vScreenSize = vec2(256,256);
        uv.x = floor(uv.x * vScreenSize.x / fMosaicScal.x) / (vScreenSize.x / fMosaicScal.x);
        uv.y = floor(uv.y * vScreenSize.y / fMosaicScal.y) / (vScreenSize.y / fMosaicScal.y);
        float t = time*0.06+random(uv.x)*0.4; float lineWidth = 0.0008;
        vec3 color = vec3(0.0);
        for(int j = 0; j < 3; j++) { for(int i=0; i < 5; i++) { color[j] += lineWidth*float(i*i) / abs(fract(t - 0.01*float(j)+float(i)*0.01)*1.0 - length(uv)); } }
        gl_FragColor = vec4(color[2],color[1],color[0],1.0);
      }`
    const material = new THREE.ShaderMaterial({ uniforms, vertexShader, fragmentShader })
    const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material); scene.add(mesh)
    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer(); renderer.setPixelRatio(window.devicePixelRatio)
    container.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
    sceneRef.current = { camera, scene, renderer, uniforms, animationId: null }
    const onWindowResize = () => { const rect = container.getBoundingClientRect(); renderer.setSize(rect.width, rect.height); uniforms.resolution.value.x = renderer.domElement.width; uniforms.resolution.value.y = renderer.domElement.height }
    onWindowResize(); window.addEventListener("resize", onWindowResize, false)
    const animate = () => { sceneRef.current.animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate); uniforms.time.value += 0.05; renderer.render(scene, camera) }
    animate()
  }

  return <div ref={containerRef} className="w-full h-full absolute" />
}
```

### 3. SCROLL EXPANSION HERO

Scroll-driven hero: video starts small, expands to fill viewport on scroll. Title splits apart. Shader visible behind.

**Component: `components/blocks/scroll-expansion-hero.tsx`**

Adapt the ScrollExpandMedia component (full code provided in attached documents). Key changes:
- Replace `<Image>` background with `<div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/40" />` so shader shows through
- Video src: `"/hero-video.mp4"` (user drops their 20s video into `public/hero-video.mp4`)
- Title: `"Magnetic Ads, Made by AI"` (splits into "Magnetic" left, "Ads, Made by AI" right)
- Subtitle (date): `"AI-Powered Marketing"`
- scrollToExpand: `"Scroll to Discover"`
- textBlend: `true`
- All text colors: `text-white` / `text-neutral-200` / `text-neutral-400` (no blues)

Children content revealed after expansion:
```
"We deploy AI influencers, intelligent workflows, and a dedicated human team to craft content that converts. Your brand deserves more than templates — it deserves Magnatic."
```

### 4. GRID FEATURE CARDS

**Component: `components/ui/grid-feature-cards.tsx`**

Use the FeatureCard + GridPattern code (provided in attached documents). Adapt for dark theme:
- Cards: `bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm`
- Grid borders: `divide-white/10 border-white/10`
- Pattern: `fill-white/5 stroke-white/10`
- Title text: `text-white`, descriptions: `text-neutral-400`

**6 Features (lucide-react icons):**
1. AI Influencers — `Sparkles` — "Virtual creators that build authentic audiences and drive real engagement for your brand."
2. Smart Workflows — `Cpu` — "Automated content pipelines powered by AI that adapt and optimize in real-time."
3. Human Expertise — `Users` — "A dedicated team of strategists and creatives ensuring every campaign hits the mark."
4. Content at Scale — `Layers` — "Generate hundreds of high-quality ad variations in minutes, not weeks."
5. Performance Analytics — `BarChart3` — "Deep insights into what works, powered by machine learning and real data."
6. Brand Safety — `Shield` — "Every piece of content reviewed and approved before it goes live."

Section heading: "Everything You Need to Dominate" / "AI-powered tools and human expertise, working together."

Animate with Framer Motion staggered blur + fade + translateY.

### 5. FOOTER

Simple footer: white logo at `h-6 opacity-60`, "© 2025 Magnatic. All rights reserved." in `text-neutral-500`, border-top `border-white/10`.

---

## Page Layout (`app/page.tsx`)

```tsx
<main>
  <div className="fixed inset-0 z-0"><ShaderAnimation /></div>
  <Navbar />
  <div className="relative z-10">
    <ScrollExpandMedia ... >
      <tagline content>
    </ScrollExpandMedia>
    <FeaturesSection />
    <Footer />
  </div>
</main>
```

---

## Design System

- Dark theme only. Shader is always the background.
- All sections transparent/semi-transparent (`bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm`)
- Colors: blacks, grays, whites. No blues. Optional accent: `#E8DCC8`
- Font: `"Sora"` or `"Outfit"` from Google Fonts
- Glass morphism everywhere

## Dependencies

```bash
npm install framer-motion lucide-react
npx shadcn@latest init
```

## File Structure

```
public/
  logo-full-white.svg, logo-full-black.svg, icon-white.svg, icon-black.svg
  hero-video.mp4         ← USER ADDS THIS

app/
  page.tsx, layout.tsx, globals.css, favicon.ico

components/
  ui/shader-lines.tsx, grid-feature-cards.tsx
  blocks/scroll-expansion-hero.tsx, features-section.tsx, navbar.tsx

lib/utils.ts
```

## Critical Notes

1. Shader background = `position: fixed`, always visible
2. ScrollExpandMedia hijacks scroll until expansion complete
3. Replace `next/image` background with transparent overlay
4. All backgrounds semi-transparent — never solid
5. Video src = `"/hero-video.mp4"` — user provides file
6. Brand = "Magnatic" (intentional spelling). Hero tagline = "Magnetic Ads, Made by AI"
7. Use exact SVGs provided above for all logos
8. Navbar: `logo-full-white.svg` at h-8. Footer: same at h-6 with opacity-60
9. Save all 4 SVG files in `/public/`
10. Build everything in one go. Only manual step: user drops video into `public/hero-video.mp4`
